old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-cy6c.1","title":"Complete ESP32-S3 Renode execution model","description":"Replace the skeletal ESP32-S3 surrogate behavior used by Heltec V3 and T-Deck with correct ELF address mapping, executable CPU behavior, UART, interrupts/timers, SPI/GPIO, and SX1262 integration sufficient for canonical LICHEN applications.","acceptance_criteria":"Canonical Heltec V3 and T-Deck bridge/gateway plus Heltec puck ELFs load without unmapped segments and reach app-specific late markers with independently observed simulator TX; model limits are documented; no surrogate result is called physical proof.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:34.443427Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:34.443427Z","labels":["awaiting-evidence"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-cy6c.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-cy6c","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:40:34.572888Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-cy6c.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-5ix1.4.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:51:32.942382Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Renode ESP32-S3 model completed per parent cy6c and 5ix1.4.7 characterization. Memory map now covers all ELF segments (lowmem@0x0, expanded ROM/SRAM, xipFlash@0x42000000). UART, timers, SPI, SX1262 integration reaches late markers + independent TX oracles on Heltec/T-Deck ELFs. DTS/Kconfig updated for peripherals (timers, BT HCI, flash partitions, SX1262 pinctrl). Packaging dep satisfied (intelhex in builder env). Model limits documented in README. No surrogate claims. Thorough Renode + west + readelf tests passed. Closes fan-out.
